title: Healing Tree heals your creature for fifty

plan.title: Healing Tree heals your creature for fifty
plan.summary: Play Healing Tree targeting a damaged friendly primary creature and verify it heals by 50 without exceeding max HP.

notes: Place test_creature_hp100 on player_1 field as primary.
Set current HP to 51 before play.

steps: Choose player_1 primary creature as target.
Resolve healing and inspect current HP.

expectedAssertions.label: Creature healed by 50 capped at max HP

manualVerification: Confirm healing cannot exceed printed max HP.
riskNotes: Target prompt should only include friendly creatures.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
